series_metadata.series_description: The direct purchase orders and bids show vendor, requisition number, purchase order number, quantity, unit, description and/or specifications, unit price and amount, also area purchasing merchandise or service and area budget code.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 fiscal years after the close of the fiscal year in which transaction was initiated and then destroyed providing audit by the State Auditor is complete. Office File-Current and 2 previous fiscal years., Paper: Wastepaper
